description_long: This object is a cylindrical metal can with a pull-tab lid, styled in the iconic Campbell's soup design but labeled as 'Primordial Soup.' The upper half of the can is red with white script reading 'Campbell's Condensed,' while the lower half is white with gold and black accents, and the word 'Primordial' in red. The front features a gold medallion and the word 'SOUP' in bold, with a fleur-de-lis motif. The back and side panels display detailed product information, including a description, directions, nutrition facts, and a stylized image of a primordial pool. The can is made of metal with a printed paper or plastic label, and the lid is slightly recessed with a pull-tab for opening. The overall appearance is clean, glossy, and reminiscent of classic canned food packaging.
description: A glossy, cylindrical metal can with a red and white Campbell's-style label reading 'Primordial Soup,' featuring detailed product information and a pull-tab lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Campbell's logo, gold medallion, and 'Primordial Soup' label prominently.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a product description, a stylized image of a primordial pool, and additional text.
description_view_2: Rear view with nutrition facts, preparation instructions, and more detailed product information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the label, barcode, and part of the Campbell's logo.
